+    "quote": "Clawdbot is the first \"software\" in ages for which I constantly check for new releases on GitHub. I bought a Mac mini for it. It has its own Apple ID, makes playlists, sends me the news, and pushes code to GitHub. It's hard to put into words. It's a special project.",

     "quote": "Just shipped my first personal AI assistant. On WhatsApp. Builds my second brain while I chat. Memory moves across agents (Codex, Cursor, Manus, etc.) And a lot more skills still to plug in. Personal AI is getting real with @steipete's @clawdbot.",
